paper.title: Evolutionary Map of the Universe: Detection and Analysis of the Shell Surrounding the Runaway Wolf-Rayet Star WR16

review.summary: This paper reports the detection and analysis of a radio shell surrounding the runaway Wolf-Rayet star WR16 using ASKAP/EMU data. It contains one internal table with measured radio flux densities of WR16 and its nebulous shell at multiple frequencies, including new ASKAP measurements and archival ATCA data, plus the derived radio spectral index. External resources include data portals for EMU/CASDA, Gaia DR3 Archive, WISE/IRSA, and SuperCOSMOS H-alpha (WFAU); generic Gaia/DPAC acknowledgements and software documentation URLs were removed.

internal_tables.role_in_paper: Lists measured radio flux densities for WR16 and its nebulous shell, combining new ASKAP/EMU data with archival ATCA observations, and the derived spectral index.

source_refs.caption: Measured flux densities of the Wolf-Rayet star WR16 and its nebulous shell. $^a$Measurements made as part of this paper. $^b$Measurements using \ac{ATCA} observations from \citet{1999ApJ...518..890C}. $^c$Measurements using \ac{ATCA} observations from \citet{1995ApJ...450..289L}.
source_refs.label: Table:Data_Fluxes

columns.name: WR16
columns.meaning: Component or region (WR16 star or its shell)

columns.name: S_944^a | (mJy)
columns.meaning: Flux density at 943.5 MHz (new ASKAP measurement)

columns.name: \alpha | \alpha+/-\Delta\alpha

internal_tables.evidence: Measured flux densities of the Wolf-Rayet star WR16 and its nebulous shell. $^a$Measurements made as part of this paper. $^b$Measurements using \ac{ATCA} observations from \citet{1999ApJ...518..890C}. $^c$Measurements using \ac{ATCA} observations from \citet{1995ApJ...450..289L}.

external_resources.description: Research Organization Registry (ROR) identifier for the Australia Telescope National Facility (ATNF), of which ASKAP is a part.
Gaia DR3 Archive at ESAC, the source of astrometric and photometric data used in the work.
NASA/IPAC Infrared Science Archive (IRSA) portal for WISE data, used for mid-infrared comparison imaging of the shell.
CSIRO ASKAP Science Data Archive (CASDA) portal, used to access EMU survey data.
Wide Field Astronomy Unit (WFAU) SuperCOSMOS H-alpha archive, used for H-alpha comparison imaging.
